name: Cleave
description: Sweeping strike hitting up to 3 adjacent enemies for 110% STR damage.

name: Battle Cry
description: Rally the party, granting +20% damage for 3 rounds.

name: Whirlwind
description: Spin attack hitting all adjacent enemies (up to 3).

name: Unbreakable
description: Enter defensive stance for 2 rounds: take 50% less damage, reflect 10% back.

name: Precise Strike
description: A meticulously aimed blow dealing 160% STR damage.

name: Defensive Stance
description: Adopt a defensive posture: take 35% less damage for 4 rounds.

name: Offensive Stance
description: Shift to an aggressive posture: deal 30% more damage for 4 rounds.

name: Riposte
description: For 3 rounds, parry incoming attacks and reflect 40% damage back to attackers.

name: Second Wind
description: Catch your breath, instantly restoring 80 HP.

name: Sunder Armor
description: A targeted blow that deals 90% STR damage and shreds the target\u2019s armor for 4 rounds.

name: Holy Strike
description: Blessed melee blow dealing STR+INT damage. Double vs undead/demons.

name: Lay on Hands
description: Instantly restore HP to one ally equal to 2× INT.

name: Divine Shield
description: Surround one ally with a barrier absorbing 3× CON damage for 2 rounds.

name: Consecration
description: Sanctify the ground: damages all enemies and heals party for 3 rounds.

name: Magic Missile
description: Launch 3 arcane bolts, each hitting a random enemy for INT damage.

name: Fireball
description: Explosive fireball hitting one enemy group with fire damage and Burn.

name: Blizzard
description: Ice storm blanketing all enemies for 3 rounds, dealing cold damage and Slow.

name: Arcane Surge
description: 400% INT damage to single target with overflow to adjacent enemies.

name: Bone Spike
description: Bone projectile dealing INT damage and applying Bleed, pierces target row.

name: Bone Spear
description: Hurl a bone spear that pierces a row of enemies for 160% INT damage.

name: Life Drain
description: Drain life from target dealing INT damage, healing Necromancer for 50%.

name: Corpse Explosion
description: Detonate a fallen enemy. Damage to adjacent foes scales with the corpse\

name: Flame Lance
description: Fire bolt dealing INT damage and applying Burn (3-round DoT).

name: Ignite
description: Set ground ablaze under one group, persisting 3 rounds with stacking Burn.

name: Pyroclasm
description: Chain fire explosion: each target triggers a secondary blast on nearest enemy, up to 3.

name: Meteor
description: Devastating meteor hitting all enemies with maximum Burn stacks and Ignite zones.

name: Aimed Shot
description: Focused ranged attack dealing 150% DEX damage. Can pierce armor via talent.

name: Multi-Shot
description: Fire at 3 separate targets simultaneously, each at 80% DEX damage.

name: Smoke Trap
description: Plant a trap that Blinds (−50% hit chance) one enemy group for 2 rounds.

name: Rain of Arrows
description: Volley descending on all enemies for 3 rounds, each dealing DEX damage.

name: Backstab
description: 169% DEX damage. Bonus if target is Stunned or Bleeding.

name: Poison Blade
description: Next 3 attacks apply Poison DoT (up to 5 stacks per source).

name: Shadow Step
description: Teleport behind target and attack for 127% DEX.

name: Death Mark
description: Marked target takes 50% more damage from all sources for 3 rounds.

name: Pilfer Magic
description: Strip the first positive status from a target enemy and apply it to yourself for the remaining duration.

name: Hemorrhage
description: Consumes all Bleed stacks on target for 30 damage each, then deals a base attack. Stacks are reset after.

name: Heal
description: Restore HP to one ally equal to 2.5× INT.

name: Smite
description: Holy bolt, double damage vs undead/demons.

name: Sanctuary
description: Ally regenerates HP each round and cannot be targeted for 3 rounds.

name: Resurrect
description: Revive a single fallen ally at 25% max HP. They gain damage immunity until their next action. 10-round cooldown per combat.

name: Inspiring Tune
description: +15% hit and +1 initiative for party for 3 rounds.

name: Discordant Wail
description: −30% damage and erratic targeting for one enemy group.

name: Ballad of Valor
description: One hero gets double actions for 1 round.

name: Song of Ruin
description: 147% INT sonic damage to all enemies, removes all their buffs.

name: Corruption
description: Target takes INT damage per round for 4 rounds. Re-casting instantly detonates all remaining DoT damage, then refreshes the status.

name: Hellfire
description: Hellfire hits enemy group, applies Burn. Bypasses fire resistance.

name: Soul Pact
description: Sacrifice 20% own HP to double all active DoT duration and damage.

name: Void Rift
description: Void rift under enemies for 3 rounds: damage + 20% stun chance each round.

name: Soul Curse
description: Apply a Curse to the target: reduces its damage output by 10%. When the cursed enemy dies the curse spreads to a random adjacent living enemy.

name: Demon Bolt
description: +50% vs demons. DEX+INT damage.

name: Glaive Toss
description: Spinning glaive hits all enemies in a row, applying Bleed.

name: Fel Sight
description: +25% hit/dodge, immune to Blind/Confuse for 3 rounds.

name: Vengeance
description: Stacks 15% damage per fallen ally. Release all stacks in one strike.

name: Lucky Strike
description: Improvised strike — 50% chance to inflict a random status (poison, bleed, or stun) for 2 rounds.

name: Thrown Junk
description: Hurl debris at an enemy group; 30% stun chance.

name: Makeshift Bomb
description: Improvised explosive: DEX+CON damage with Burn to a group.

name: Big Score
description: A wild gambling strike: 250% DEX with ±80% variance — could crit for 4.5× or whiff for 0.5×.

name: Riposte
description: Enter parry stance: counter next melee hit for 200% DEX damage.

name: Flourish
description: 3 rapid strikes, each building Flair stacks for Grandeur.

name: Taunt
description: Force one enemy to target only you for 2 rounds; +30% dodge vs them.

name: Grandeur
description: Consume all Flair stacks for DEX × stacks damage + random debuffs per stack.

name: Dragon Claw
description: Savage strike ignoring 20% armor; hits adjacent enemies.

name: Breath Weapon
description: Cone of fire/ice/lightning hitting one group. Choose element at class creation.

name: Dragon Scales
description: 30% damage reduction + element immunity for 3 rounds.

name: Draconic Fury
description: All attacks become group AoE, +50% damage for 2 rounds. Cannot be Stunned.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Bolt leaps to 3 targets for 130% INT damage.

name: Static Field
description: Current arcs across all enemies dealing 50% INT and reducing their speed.

name: Thunder Ring
description: Ring of thunder centered on self hits all nearby enemies.

name: Tempest
description: Unleash a storm that strikes every enemy for 220% INT.

name: Rejuvenation
description: Instant heal + Regen 1× INT / round for 3 rounds.

name: Entangle
description: Vines root a row, 80% INT damage and Stun 1 round.

name: Wild Shape
description: Shapeshift: +50% damage and −20% incoming for 4 rounds.

name: Nature
description: The wilds strike back — 200% INT to all enemies, Bleed 3 rounds.

name: Foresight
description: Grant an ally a 40 HP barrier for 2 rounds.

name: Prophecy
description: Party gains +25 Dodge for 3 rounds.

name: Fate Weave
description: Rewrite a target\u2019s fate: 251% INT damage and converts to heal for weakest ally.

name: Ascendance
description: Party transcends for 4 rounds: +30% damage, −30% incoming.

name: Rally Action
description: Grant an ally an immediate extra action.

name: Feint
description: 120% DEX damage and forces target to the back of turn order.

name: Reposition
description: Shift the formation: party gains +15 Dodge and −15% damage taken for 2 rounds.

name: Masterstroke
description: Whole party acts again at +50% damage.

name: Haste
description: Speed another ally — they act again this round. Cannot target self.

name: Slow Time
description: All enemies lose 1 action next round and take 40% INT damage.

name: Rewind
description: Rewind an ally\u2019s wounds for 3× INT HP and clear one status effect.

name: Time Stop
description: Freeze time: enemies skip next round; party gets an extra action.

name: Palm Strike
description: A focused palm strike for 130% DEX damage.

name: Flurry
description: Three rapid strikes, each 60% DEX damage.

name: Inner Focus
description: Meditate briefly: heal self for 2.5× DEX and restore 15 MP.

name: Shadow Step
description: Dash behind target and strike for 200% DEX with +40% crit.

name: Spirit Bolt
description: A bolt of spirit energy dealing 150% INT damage.

name: Healing Totem
description: Summon a totem that heals the party for 1× INT each round for 3 rounds.

name: Spirit Chain
description: Lightning leaps between up to 3 enemies at 120% INT each.

name: Ancestral Shield
description: Party gains −30% damage taken and a barrier equal to 50% of caster INT for 3 rounds.

name: Silver Bolt
description: Silver-tipped bolt dealing 140% DEX damage. +50% vs demons and undead.

name: Dispel Curse
description: Remove all negative status effects from an ally and heal 0.5× DEX.

name: Purge Strike
description: 170% DEX damage; +50% vs demons and undead.

name: Inquisitor\u2019s Mark
description: Mark a target — it takes 40% more damage from the party for 3 rounds.

name: Shield Bash
description: Bash with shield for 110% STR damage; 60% chance to Stun.

name: Taunt
description: Force enemies to target you for 2 rounds; −25% damage taken.

name: Holy Strike
description: 180% STR damage; +50% vs demons and undead.

name: Rally
description: Rally the party: +25% damage and −15% damage taken for 3 rounds.

name: Wild Bolt
description: A chaotic bolt dealing 160% INT damage of a random element (fire/cold/lightning).

name: Arcane Surge
description: Double spell damage for 2 rounds.

name: Mana Burn
description: 120% INT damage and drains 20 MP; each MP drained adds 1 damage.

name: Chaos Ward
description: Barrier equal to 2× INT for 3 rounds; reflects 30% of damage taken.

name: Rune Hammer
description: A rune-imbued hammer blow dealing 140% STR damage.

name: Rune of Warding
description: Inscribe a rune on an ally granting a barrier equal to 1.5× STR for 3 rounds.

name: Rune of Might
description: Party gains +25% damage for 3 rounds.

name: Forge Flame
description: Unleash forge-flame on a row: 130% STR damage and Burns for 3 rounds.

name: Shadow Strike
description: 150% DEX damage with +20% crit.

name: Smoke Veil
description: Vanish in smoke: +40 Dodge and Stealth for 2 rounds.

name: Assassinate
description: 220% DEX damage. If target is below 25% HP, triple damage.

name: Dance of Blades
description: Whirl through all enemies twice, each strike 80% DEX damage.

name: Clockwork Bolt
description: Fire a rune-etched brass bolt. 120% INT damage. Cheap reliable opener.

name: Alchemical Grenade
description: Lob a hissing brass grenade. 90% INT to three adjacent targets; 40% chance to Burn.

name: Quick-Fix
description: Apply a brass clockwork patch — restores HP equal to 160% INT to one ally.

name: Overcharge
description: Wind the arcane battery — entire party gains +25% damage and +10% crit chance for 3 rounds.

name: Mend
description: Heal one ally for 200% INT.

name: Call Back
description: Call a fallen ally back to consciousness at 50% HP. Brief immunity until their next action.

name: Shadow Bolt
description: Hurl a tendril of shadow at one enemy. Pure shadow damage; benefits from spell power.

name: Shadow Veil
description: A drifting shadow veil rolls across the enemy field — moderate shadow damage to all foes; 60% chance to Blind for 2 rounds.

name: Lullaby
description: Sing a soft melody at one foe — 85% chance to put them to Sleep for 2 rounds. Any damage wakes them.

name: Mind Charm
description: Whisper a charm into a foe — modest psychic damage and a 70% chance to Confuse them for 2 rounds.

name: Mass Drowse
description: A drifting violet mist rolls across the enemy field — every foe rolls 55% to fall asleep for 2 rounds.

name: Arcane Jolt
description: A controlled lance of violet psychic force. Deals heavy single-target damage — keep this for finishing the targets you
